utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format has 5 items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. Now check the final plan: it includes health_coverage (with physical and mental health plus costs and coverage details, and a total monthly health cost), property_coverage (home/contents insurance with provider, monthly cost, and coverage), travel_coverage (provider, monthly cost, and coverage), additional_services (provider, monthly cost, coverage), and total_budget (monthly and annual costs and savings). Each required item is present and includes costs and coverage details as requested. Therefore, all 5 items are fully specified.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: We match each provider in the final plan to the exact name in the ground-truth ratings. The final plan includes: LifeFirst Standard Plan (Physical) which corresponds to primary_health_coverage.physical_health.LifeFirst Standard Plan (rating 8); LifeFirst Standard Plan (Mental) which corresponds to primary_health_coverage.mental_health.LifeFirst Standard Plan (rating 8); HomeFirst Standard Coverage which corresponds to property_protection.home_content.HomeFirst Standard Coverage (rating 7); TravelFirst Standard Plan which corresponds to mobility_coverage.travel_insurance.TravelFirst Standard Plan (rating 8); Premium Insurance Membership which corresponds to general_services.Premium Insurance Membership (rating 10).
